name: codex-skill-forge
description: Create, validate, forward-test, and package high-quality Codex skills.

interface.longDescription: A public-ready Codex skill and plugin that helps agents design, scaffold, validate, forward-test, and document new Codex skills from user briefs and examples.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-skill-forge to design a new Codex skill from this brief.
Use $codex-skill-forge to validate and improve this skill package.
Use $codex-skill-forge to package this skill as a plugin-ready repo.
